task_completion.description: Verify the specified HDRI environment texture is loaded into the world lighting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender Shader Editor (set to World context) or World Properties tab, an Environment Texture node should be visible with the file 'studio_small_09_1k.exr' loaded.

task_completion.description: Verify the Z-Rotation of the world lighting is set to 125 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shader Editor (World context), a Mapping node connected to the Environment Texture should show the Z-axis Rotation value set to 125° (or 125d).

task_completion.description: Verify the saturation is set to 0.0 for a monochromatic effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shader Editor (World context) or World Properties, a Hue/Saturation/Value node (or similar color adjustment) should be present with the Saturation value set to 0.000.

task_completion.description: Verify the final image is rendered and saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser or terminal shows 'noir_render.png' in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory, or the Blender Image Editor shows the render being saved to this path.

task_completion.description: Verify the Blender project file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender application window title bar displays 'noir_setup.blend', or a file browser shows 'noir_setup.blend' in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Blender GUI to configure the lighting and nodes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender interface (Shader Editor, World Properties, etc.) being actively used, rather than just a terminal executing a Python script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the rendered image is a genuine output of the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The render window or saved image should show a 3D scene with black-and-white (monochromatic) lighting, not a blank image, a solid color, or a pre-downloaded stock photo.

integrity.description: Verify Blender is actually running and used for the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Blender UI (viewport, outliner, properties, shader editor) must be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: HDRI Path: /home/ga/assets/studio_small_09_1k.exr. Target Z-Rotation: 125 degrees (2.18166 radians, tolerance 0.2 radians). Target Saturation: 0.0 (tolerance 0.05). Output files: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/noir_setup.blend and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/noir_render.png.
